text: ⚠️ [SURPRISE ENCOUNTER!] A shadowy thief drops from the branches above! They snatch 5 gold coins from your pouch before vanishing into the thicket.
⚠️ [SURPRISE ENCOUNTER!] You trip over a mossy stone, but underneath it, you spy a glimmering Elven Potion nestled in the roots!
⚠️ [SURPRISE ENCOUNTER!] An old wandering hermit steps out from behind an oak tree. He whispers a cryptic riddle about the castle ahead, then steps back into the fog.
⚠️ You step on a hidden pressure plate! A stone slab drops behind you, trapping you in a small chamber...
